race.comment: INKARUNA (10) brings the right form second-up after taking good ground off Beadman with a narrow second over 1100m in the LR Fireball Stakes at Randwick. Down sharply in weight and proven at the trip. Hard to hold out. MONTE SUPREME (4) solid second-up mare unlucky not to win the G3 Nivison in the Spring over this track and trip. Key jockey change today after finding them too sharp when sixth in the G2 Challenge Stakes over 1000m at Randwick. Leading top-four player. WITHIN THE LAW (5) classy filly resuming. Stretched out in trip against stronger opposition in the Spring. Can sprint well fresh from the low gate with the two trials under the belt. ASGARDA (12) gripped on late first-up at the big odds when third in the G3 Wenona Girl over this trip at Randwick. That was no fluke and don't dismiss.
